mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ma_otp (email, ma_otp, loai, het_han_luc, da_dung) VALUES (#{email}, #{maOtp}, #{loai}, #{hetHanLuc}, 0)
mapper.update: UPDATE ma_otp SET da_dung = 1 WHERE email = #{email} AND loai = #{loai} AND da_dung = 0
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ma_otp WHERE email = #{email} AND loai = #{loai} AND ma_otp = #{maOtp} AND da_dung = 0 AND het_han_luc > NOW() ORDER BY ma DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE ma_otp SET da_dung = 1 WHERE ma = #{ma}
